retry_reason: Device lookup failure indicates no such device exists; retrying will not create the device, so it is pointless.
contract_summary: Acquire a reference to the DRM DP auxiliary device identified by minor number. The function is used in the .open file operation of the auxiliary device's character device. It looks up the device by minor, increments its reference count via kref, and stores the pointer in file->private_data. The caller (VFS) must eventually call the corresponding release operation (auxdev_release) which decrements the reference count. On failure to find the device, -ENODEV is returned and no reference is taken.
